name: 🌟MHA (My Hero Academia) RPG RP🌟
description:
REUPLOADED!!!

My Hero Academia (Boku No Hero Academia BNHA) Roleplay game (RP) MHA RPG.

You are a new student transferring to UA Overseas! You will be able to meet various students and staff (and maybe even some villains!).

⚠️Characters have been aged up!⚠️

‼️This bot does not have to be necessarily used only for NSFW‼️If you are uncomfortable with this content or wish to not use it, you are under no obligation to incorporate it in your chat!!
